<p class="key-answer" data-question="Paclitaxel 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Paclitaxel</strong> 目前有 <strong>22 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Paclitaxel 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Apexelsin monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of metastatic breast cancer in adult patients who have failed first-line treatment for metastatic disease and for whom standard, anthracycline...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>female breast carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>estrogen-receptor negative breast cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>Ehrlich tumor carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>hormone-resistant breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>estrogen-receptor positive breast cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>bilateral breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>breast carcinoma by gene expression profile（99.9%）</li>
<li>nipple carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian clear cell adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（99.7%）</li>
<li>borderline epithelial tumor of ovary（99.7%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>maligant granulosa cell tumor of ovary（99.7%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarian endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
